chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 371 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.3925/202 (C/A) 30-09-2025 Petitioner Mansoor Ali Khoso, present in person Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Nadir Shahzad Khan, Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur and Abdul Sattar Solangi, Inspector Stamps >>>>>><<<<<<< Learned Additional AG files compliance report on behalf of Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur, which is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to the Petitioner, who is present in person submits that his grievance has been redressed, therefore, does not press the listed application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
